sections.heading: Secs. 33-180 to 33-182. Formation of medical group clinics. Clinic registration certificate. Appeal from decision of board.

body: Secs. 33-180 to 33-182. Formation of medical group clinics. Clinic registration certificate. Appeal from decision of board. Sections 33-180 to 33-182 , inclusive, are repealed.
